wordplay_note: The king who fails to recognize sovereignty in the humblest creature
card_description: Captain Koenig (meaning "Koenig = king (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Beyond Lies the Wub*. Ship captain who kills and eats the wub only to be absorbed by it. Name note: The king who fails to recognize sovereignty in the humblest creature. Violence against the gentle alien rebounds — the wub's consciousness persists in the eater. First appears in *Beyond Lies the Wub*.

reference.brief: Ship captain who kills and eats the wub only to be absorbed by it
reference.significance: Violence against the gentle alien rebounds — the wub's consciousness persists in the eater
